---
title: "Example Project"
author: Ray Wang
date: "2026-05-24"
categories:
  - example
subtitle: >
  A placeholder project entry showing the layout. Replace with real projects.
description: |
  This is a placeholder demonstrating how a project listing entry is structured.
  Drop a `featured.png` (or `featured.jpg`) in this folder for the cover image,
  add real content below, and rename the folder to your dated project slug
  (`YYYY-MM-DD-project-slug`).
links:
- icon: github
  name: Source
  url: https://github.com/
---

## Overview

Short summary of what this project is and why it exists.

## What I learned

A few takeaways from building it — things that worked, things that didn't, and what I'd do differently next time.

## Tech

- Tool / library 1
- Tool / library 2
- Tool / library 3
